title: rosa acicularis var. engelmannii
intro: Rosa acicularis var. engelmannii, also known as Engelmann's rose, is a variety of wild rose that is native to North America and is characterized by its prickly stems and pale yellow to white flowers. The medicinal properties of this plant include its high content of flavonoids, phenolic acids, and essential oils, which have been traditionally used to treat various health issues. The health benefits associated with Engelmann's rose include its anti-inflammatory, antioxidant, and antimicrobial properties, which may help to reduce pain, improve cardiovascular health, and prevent infections. The herbal preparations of this plant include teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be used to support overall well-being and alleviate symptoms of various health conditions.
